projectDescription: A multi-threaded, embeddable, memory-safe cache engine with RESP2 protocol compatibility, JSON document database, vector search, and CDC capabilities.
keyFeatures: RESP2 protocol compatibility with Redis clients
JSON document database with secondary indexes and WHERE queries
HNSW vector search with multiple distance metrics
Change data capture with per-shard ring buffers
WAL and RDB persistence with LZ4 compression
Embeddable library mode for in-process use
Built-in observability with hot-key detection and metrics
publicApiSurface: String commands: GET, SET, GETSET, APPEND, STRLEN, INCR, DECR, INCRBY, DECRBY, MGET, MSET, SETNX
Key commands: DEL, EXISTS, EXPIRE, PEXPIRE, PERSIST, TTL, PTTL, TYPE, KEYS, SCAN, DBSIZE, FLUSHDB
List commands: LPUSH, RPUSH, LPOP, RPOP, LLEN, LRANGE, LINDEX
Hash commands: HSET, HGET, HDEL, HGETALL, HLEN, HEXISTS, HINCRBY
Set commands: SADD, SREM, SMEMBERS, SISMEMBER, SCARD
Document commands: DOC.CREATE, DOC.SET, DOC.GET, DOC.FIND, DOC.COUNT, DOC.CREATEINDEX, DOC.DROPINDEX
Pub/Sub commands: SUBSCRIBE, UNSUBSCRIBE, PSUBSCRIBE, PUNSUBSCRIBE, PUBLISH
Embedded API: Database::open(), get(), set(), hset(), doc_find(), vec_search()
